title: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model that creates tracks up to 3 minutes long with customization and creative control. The tool is being expanded across more Google products, building on the earlier Lyria 3 model released the previous month.
